results.skip_reason: Both files were deleted by commit 3046a6ba 'fix: revert broken refactor of core-iching/practices.ts' on 2026-06-16 12:21. The large_file agent (ta-1781622042-4, iter 7) extracted lookup helpers and Cromoterapia practices to separate files but introduced a circular import (practices ↔ practices-lookup), 27 TypeScript redeclaration errors, and missing data wiring for 5 Cromoterapia practices. The revert restored the monolithic practices.ts. The remaining 993-line practices.ts already has comprehensive test coverage in packages/core-iching/src/__tests__/practices.test.ts (49 practices, all 6 main exports: getPractice, getPracticesByElement, getPracticesByTradition, getPracticesByCategory, getPracticesByLifeArea, getAllPractices — all green).
